content.cn_text: Staff：这里是 Nature Farm，请问有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Staff: Nature Farm speaking, how can I help you?

content.cn_text: Applicant：你好，早上好。
content.en_text: Applicant: Hi, morning.

content.cn_text: 我想了解一下广告里那个水果采摘兼职工作的情况。
content.en_text: I'd like to get some information about the part-time job of fruit picking in the advertisement.

content.cn_text: 我想问你们现在还需要额外人手吗？
content.en_text: I was wondering if you still need some extra hands?

content.cn_text: Staff：是的，需要。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, I do.

content.cn_text: 我可以先记录一些你的信息吗？
content.en_text: May I take some of your information first?

content.cn_text: 你叫什么名字？
content.en_text: What's your name?

content.cn_text: Applicant：Sophie Harries，拼写是 H-A-R-R-I-E-S。
content.en_text: Applicant: Sophie Harries, that's H-A-R-R-I-E-S.

content.cn_text: Staff：很高兴和你通话，Sophie。
content.en_text: Staff: Nice to talk with you, Sophie.

content.cn_text: 你现在住在哪里？
content.en_text: Where are you currently staying?

content.cn_text: Applicant：嗯，我来自伦敦，但现在住在悉尼的 Central Hostel。
content.en_text: Applicant: Well, I'm from London, but now I'm staying at Central Hostel, Sydney.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的，可以给我你的联系电话吗？
content.en_text: Staff: OK, may I have your contact number?

content.cn_text: 我从网站上看到你的号码是 0452832727，对吗？
content.en_text: I can see from the website your number is 0452832727, right?

content.cn_text: Applicant：哦，不好意思。
content.en_text: Applicant: Oh, sorry.

content.cn_text: 最后一位应该是 1，不是 7。
content.en_text: The last digit should be 1, not 7.

content.cn_text: Staff：记下了。
content.en_text: Staff: Got that.

content.cn_text: 现在，你知道我们只招聘18岁以上的兼职员工，所以可以告诉我你的年龄吗？
content.en_text: And now, you know we only recruit part-time employees over 18, so could I have your age, please?

content.cn_text: Applicant：我现在18岁，但这个月底就满19岁了，所以你可以填19。
content.en_text: Applicant: I am 18, but I will have my 19th birthday at the end of this month, so you can put 19.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的。
content.en_text: Staff: Cool.

content.cn_text: 生日快乐，Sophie。
content.en_text: Happy birthday, Sophie.

content.cn_text: 好，我们进入正题吧。
content.en_text: Well, let's move on to the real business.

content.cn_text: 我们现在有两个工作地点。
content.en_text: We now have two working sites.

content.cn_text: 一个是在北昆士兰的水果农场，另一个在海岸附近。
content.en_text: One is a fruit farm in North Queensland and the other one is near the coast.

content.cn_text: 你更喜欢哪一个？
content.en_text: Which do you prefer?

content.cn_text: Applicant：呃，嗯。
content.en_text: Applicant: Er, hmm.

content.cn_text: 我觉得如果下班后能在海滩上待一会儿会更好，所以我想
content.en_text: I think it will be better if I can spend some time on the beach after work, so I guess

content.cn_text: 第二个地方听起来最适合我。
content.en_text: the second place sounds best to me.

content.cn_text: Staff：没问题，Sophie。
content.en_text: Staff: No problem, Sophie.

content.cn_text: 那你什么时候可以准备好来工作？
content.en_text: And do you think you could be ready to join us?

content.cn_text: Applicant：现在是7月，我想先在这附近旅行一下。
content.en_text: Applicant: It's July now and I'd like to do some travelling around here.

content.cn_text: 8月怎么样？
content.en_text: What about August?

content.cn_text: Staff：可以，8月是我们最忙的月份。
content.en_text: Staff: Yes, August is the busiest month for us.

content.cn_text: 我们总是缺人手。
content.en_text: We're always short of hands.

content.cn_text: Applicant：你能告诉我工资怎么给吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: And could you please tell me how I will get paid?

content.cn_text: Staff：我们可以按每篮水果付钱，也可以按小时付钱。
content.en_text: Staff: We can pay you by every basket of fruits or by the hour.

content.cn_text: 由你决定。
content.en_text: It's up to you.

content.cn_text: Applicant：你知道，我以前没做过水果采摘，所以我觉得按小时付钱更适合我。
content.en_text: Applicant: You know, I haven't done fruit picking before, so I guess pay by the hour suits me better.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的，我记下了。
content.en_text: Staff: OK, I've got that.

content.cn_text: 现在有三种水果：香蕉、芒果和牛油果，你想采摘哪种水果？
content.en_text: And there are now three types of fruits, bananas, mangoes and avocados, which fruit would

content.cn_text: 你想采摘哪一种？
content.en_text: you like to pick?

content.cn_text: Applicant：我更喜欢芒果，我觉得它对我来说会更容易。
content.en_text: Applicant: I prefer mangoes, I think it will be easier for me.

content.cn_text: Staff：很好，我相信你会喜欢的。
content.en_text: Staff: Cool, I'm sure you'll enjoy that.

content.cn_text: 好的，现在我想再问你几个关于你自己的问题。
content.en_text: OK, now I'd like to ask you a few more questions about yourself.

content.cn_text: 你有什么健康问题吗，比如高血压、心脏病，或者其他
content.en_text: Do you have any medical problems, like high blood pressure, heart disease or anything

content.cn_text: 类似问题？
content.en_text: like that?

content.cn_text: Applicant：其实我最近刚做过体检，一切看起来都正常。
content.en_text: Applicant: Actually, I just had a medical checkup recently, and everything seemed fine.

content.cn_text: 嗯，去年我和室友打羽毛球时伤过背，不过现在已经没事了。
content.en_text: Well, I hurt my back when I played badminton with my roommate last year, but it's OK

content.cn_text: 现在好了。
content.en_text: now.

content.cn_text: Staff：啊，好的。
content.en_text: Staff: Aha, great.

content.cn_text: 我们所有员工都必须有医疗保险，以防工作时受伤，
content.en_text: And all of our workers are required to have medical insurance in case people hurt themselves

content.cn_text: 比如从梯子上摔下来。
content.en_text: while working, like falling down a ladder.

content.cn_text: 你现在有保险吗？
content.en_text: Have you got one now?

content.cn_text: Applicant：有，我当然希望工作时不会发生这种事。
content.en_text: Applicant: Yes, and I definitely hope it won't happen during working.

content.cn_text: Staff：嗯，不过你还是要多加小心。
content.en_text: Staff: Aha, yet you still need to take much care.

content.cn_text: 顺便问一下，你有驾驶执照吗？
content.en_text: By the way, do you have a driver's license?

content.cn_text: 你知道水果农场很大，有时你需要开车。
content.en_text: You know the fruit farm is huge, sometimes you will need to drive a car.

content.cn_text: Applicant：有，我去年拿到了驾驶执照，但恐怕我没有驾驶
content.en_text: Applicant: Yes, I got my driver's license last year, but I'm afraid I don't have a license for

content.cn_text: 大型卡车的执照。
content.en_text: driving large trucks.

content.cn_text: Staff：不用担心，你不负责把采摘的水果运到超市。
content.en_text: Staff: No worries, you are not responsible for delivering the picked fruit to the supermarkets.

content.cn_text: 会有专门的司机做那项工作。
content.en_text: There are some drivers doing that work.

content.cn_text: 最后还有一个问题，你想住在哪里？
content.en_text: And lastly, one more question, where would you like to live?

content.cn_text: Applicant：有什么选择吗？
content.en_text: Applicant: Any options for me?

content.cn_text: Staff：嗯，有两个选择。
content.en_text: Staff: Well, two choices.

content.cn_text: 你可以住在农场的小屋里，或者我们可以在附近的城镇安排住宿。
content.en_text: You can either stay in a cottage on the farm, or we can arrange accommodation in a town nearby.

content.cn_text: Applicant：我不太想整天都待在工作地点。
content.en_text: Applicant: I don't think I'd like to stay at the workplace all day long.

content.cn_text: 我觉得第二个选择更适合我。
content.en_text: I think the second one is better for me.

content.cn_text: Staff：好的，就这么安排。
content.en_text: Staff: Okay, let's do that.

content.cn_text: 期待很快见到你。
content.en_text: Looking forward to seeing you soon.

groups.desc:
Complete the form below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Current address: 1. __________ Hostel, Sydney
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问当前地址是悉尼的什么 Hostel。原文说 staying at Central Hostel, Sydney，所以答案是 Central。

items.title: Age: 2. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问年龄。原文说 I am 18，但随后更正为 you can put 19，所以答案是 19。

items.title: Preferred working location: near the 3. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问偏好的工作地点靠近哪里。原文说 the other one is near the coast，申请人选择 the second place，所以答案是 coast。

items.title: Available to work in 4. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问可以在哪个月工作。申请人说 What about August，工作人员确认 August is the busiest month，所以答案是 August。

items.title: Preferred to be paid by 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问申请人希望按什么方式付薪。原文说 pay by the hour suits me better，所以答案是 hour。

items.title: Type of fruit to pick up: 6. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问想采摘的水果类型。原文说 I prefer mangoes，所以答案是 mangoes。

items.title: Health condition: used to have a problem with 7. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问健康状况中以前哪里有问题。原文说 I hurt my back last year，所以答案是 back。

items.title: Has medical 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问申请人是否有 medical 什么。原文说 workers are required to have medical insurance，申请人回答 Yes，所以答案是 insurance。

items.title: Doesn't have a license for 9. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问没有什么驾驶执照。原文说 I don't have a license for driving large trucks，所以答案是 trucks。

items.title: Accommodation arranged in a close 10. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问住宿安排在附近的什么地方。原文说 arrange accommodation in a town nearby，申请人选择 the second one，所以答案是 town。
